questions: Were there actual merge conflicts in helix-cli that needed resolution?

answers.answer: No. The merge-conflicts.json listed src/tickets/index.ts, but the file contained no conflict markers when inspected. The merge was auto-resolved cleanly by git.
evidence: Grep for conflict markers in src/tickets/index.ts returned no matches
Broad grep across all source files in src/ returned no conflict markers

statement: Conflict resolution run for helix-cli completed. No actual conflict markers were present in the listed file (src/tickets/index.ts) or anywhere else in the repository. No code changes were needed. Typecheck passes.
